title: Trump Says Cease-Fire Is Intact After Trade of Attacks in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The president dismissed Iran’s firing on U.S. vessels in the strait as a mere “trifle.”
summary_public: The president dismissed Iran’s firing on U.S. vessels in the strait as a mere “trifle.”

IR.label: neutral
